message:
fix: add requireDoltServer and unique prefixes to integration tests

beads_routing_integration_test.go and hook_slot_integration_test.go created
Dolt databases without calling requireDoltServer(t), causing them to connect
to whatever server happened to be running rather than the ephemeral test
server. They also used fixed prefixes, risking database name collisions.

Changes:
- beads_routing_integration_test.go: Refactored setupRoutingTestTown into
  setupRoutingTestTownWithPrefixes for parameterized prefixes. Added
  requireDoltServer(t) and atomic counter-based unique prefixes to
  TestBeadsRoutingFromTownRoot, TestBeadsListFromPolecatDirectory, and
  TestBeadsListFromCrewDirectory.
- hook_slot_integration_test.go: Modified setupHookTestTown to call
  requireDoltServer(t), generate unique prefixes via atomic counter, and
  return the prefix. Replaced initBeadsDB with initBeadsDBWithPrefix in
  all hook tests.

All test files are in package cmd with //go:build integration, so the
existing TestMain in integration_testmain_test.go already handles server
lifecycle (cleanupDoltServer) for all of them.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
